name: Les Petoncles a La Nage (Scallop Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring white wine, fish stock and vegetables to a boil.
2. Add salt and pepper to taste.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender-crisp.
4. Place 6 scallops in each of 2 heated bowls.
5. Divide the very hot stock among the bowls.
6. Stir briefly and serve at once.
SERVES: 2
